data.vp_summary:
FSI dropped from 16 to 5 (optimal) — incidents pillar recovered from 50 to 6 after last week's Sev 2 MI cleared. Availability held at 99.75%, sessions stable at 13 (apdex 0.78), performance at 10. Four Sev 3 MIs this week vs. three total MIs last week, but all Sev 3s carry lower scoring weight — the absence of Sev 1-2 events is what brought the composite down.

ETRC tells a different story. Enrollment Support & Ops remains at D (1.2/4.0) with 130 Major Days Breached (threshold 25) and 1,850 Minor Days Breached (threshold 250) — no movement from last week's 140 and 1,900. Post sits at C (2.4/4.0) with 120 Major Days Breached, down marginally from 125. Pre holds B (2.8/4.0) but carries 1,575 Minor Days Breached (threshold 250). Financial Enablement is the only A at 3.6/4.0. All four groups are burning MI Error Budget at 25 days (threshold 15) except Pre and Post, which zeroed out.

The divergence is structural, not contradictory. FSI measures student-facing failures this week — a clean snapshot. ETRC measures cumulative SLA debt from prior weeks that hasn't been worked down. Enrollment Support & Ops has been sitting on 130+ Major Days Breached for two weeks running, which means the backlog isn't moving and the team has no capacity buffer when the next incident lands. The FSI score reflects current-week stability; the ETRC score reflects the team's inability to absorb what's coming.

group_insights.cd8818701b80c4907f97337bcd4bcb35: Enrollment Support & Ops holds at D (1.2/4.0) with 130 Major Days Breached and 1,850 Minor Days Breached — no progress from last week. Three of this week's four MIs landed here, and the backlog isn't moving.
group_insights.c0de17e81b8c84907f97337bcd4bcbad: Financial Enablement remains at A (3.6/4.0) with 15 Major Days Breached and 100 Minor Days Breached, both under threshold. MI Error Budget at 25 days is the only non-passing metric.
group_insights.9c1c30801bc404907f97337bcd4bcb74: Pre holds B (2.8/4.0) with 30 Major Days Breached (down from 32) and 1,575 Minor Days Breached (down from 1,650). Minor backlog is still 6x threshold — marginal improvement, not resolution.
group_insights.58d26bec1b8c84907f97337bcd4bcb44: Post sits at C (2.4/4.0) with 120 Major Days Breached (down from 125) — still 5x threshold. Minor Days Breached at 125 is under threshold, but the Major backlog defines the grade.
